bodyText:
What is forensic accounting & fraud investigation? CFE-led forensic accounting, fraud investigation, due diligence, whistleblower investigation, and expert witness testimony.
Forensic Accounting & Fraud Investigation is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Andaman and Nicobar Islands, Andaman and Nicobar Islands since 2012.
Quick Answer: Forensic Accounting in Andaman and Nicobar Islands — CFE-led forensic accounting, fraud investigation, due diligence, whistleblower investigation, and ex. From ₹1,00,000. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Forensic Accounting & Fraud Investigation in Andaman and Nicobar Islands
Virtual Auditor provides forensic accounting & fraud investigation across Andaman and Nicobar Islands. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Andaman and Nicobar Islands with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Chennai handles company registrations and filings for Andaman and Nicobar Islands. Stamp duty: As per UT schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable.

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Andaman and Nicobar Islands

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.a: Application of CFE investigation techniques to detect financial fraud, embezzlement, and misrepresentation. Combines accounting, auditing, and investigative skills.
PE/VC investors for due diligence, companies investigating employee fraud, boards handling whistleblower complaints, and litigants requiring expert witness.

faqs.q: What credentials does your forensic team have?
faqs.a: Led by CA V. Viswanathan who holds CFE (Certified Fraud Examiner) from ACFE USA, in addition to FCA and ACS.

faqs.q: Do you provide forensic accounting services in Andaman and Nicobar Islands?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Andaman and Nicobar Islands from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Andaman and Nicobar Islands?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Andaman and Nicobar Islands fall under ROC Chennai. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Andaman and Nicobar Islands-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Andaman and Nicobar Islands?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Andaman and Nicobar Islands: As per UT schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
